title: The Last Color
desc: Choti dreams of going to school but earns by walking tightropes. She meets Noor, a lonely widow who longs to play Holi. Together, they find hope and friendship in tough times.

title: India's 50 Best Dishes S02
desc: Host Kunal Kapoor travels across India with food lovers like Riya and Aman to discover iconic flavors, legendary recipes and culinary traditions that define the nation's cuisine.

title: Thalapathy is the G.O.A.T.
desc: Gandhi, an undercover agent, faces danger and heartbreak when his family gets caught in his secret missions. Years later, he reunites with a lookalike of his lost son, but trouble looms.

title: Chatur Singh 2 Star
desc: Chatur Singh, a clumsy cop, is sent to solve a murder in South Africa but ends up tangled in chaos with oddballs and diamonds that test his last shot at redemption.

title: Madaari
desc: A grieving father takes matters into his own hands after a tragedy, exposing deep corruption and triggering a pursuit that challenges morality and the system itself.

title: Pehchaan
desc: Wife's disappearance sparks suspicions of infidelity, challenging her loyalty.

title: Kesari
desc: True story of Havildar Ishar Singh, who leads 21 Sikh soldiers of the British Indian Army in the historic Battle of Saragarhi, bravely fighting against overwhelming odds to defend their post.
